name: agriculture-assistants-example
description: Small example dataset for agriculture assistant evaluation.

items.question: What are the main indicators of healthy soil for crop production?
items.expected_answer: Main indicators include: dark color (organic matter), crumbly structure (good tilth), earthy smell (microbial activity), pH between 6.0-7.0 for most crops, adequate drainage, presence of earthworms, and organic matter content above 3%.

items.question: What are the advantages of drip irrigation over flood irrigation?
items.expected_answer: Drip irrigation uses 30-50% less water, delivers water directly to root zones reducing evaporation, minimizes weed growth between rows, allows precise nutrient delivery (fertigation), reduces soil erosion, and works well on sloped terrain.
